name: launch
description: Launch Code OSS (VS Code from sources) into an isolated throwaway profile with unique debug ports so you can drive it with @playwright/cli AND attach a Node debugger via dap-cli in the same session.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 launch 相關工作
幫我啟用 launch 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 launch

examples.intent: Use the launch skill for this task.
